titles.title: Jesus Don’t Give Up On Me

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus I know, I’ve neglected to do The little things or big things You’ve wanted me to do I’ve let you down Jesus, That's not hard to see Jesus, Oh Jesus, don’t give up on me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Stand by me Jesus forgive me somehow If there’s any hope left don’t leave me now I might be worth saving I’m trying to be Jesus Oh Jesus, don’t give up on me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It's late I know, and I’ve made you wait But don’t turn the light out Don't close the door Forgiveness, and patience, that’s all I need Jesus, Oh Jesus, don’t give up on me.
